codeReview.summary: Comprehensive documentation update across 10 files reflecting the completed rendering architecture (Phases 1-3). All five verification criteria pass: (1) CLAUDE.md 'Where We Left Off' rewritten to describe all three phases as complete with accurate post-cleanup architecture summary. (2) design/journal.md has Phase 1/2/3 checkboxes marked complete with dates and status changed from 'SETTLED' to 'COMPLETE'. (3) system/DESIGN.md accurately describes post-cleanup architecture — scene library is purely geometric, compositor is 174-line content-agnostic pixel pump, new render library section (1.8) added with correct description, dependency map updated, font handling boundary documented. (4) Stale references cleaned: CHROME_ICON constant removed from palette.rs, SVG comment in build.rs updated to 'glyph rasterization', TextRun::glyph_count doc updated to Content::Glyphs in scene/lib.rs, stale SVG test comment removed from drawing.rs, compositor-centric wording updated in scene_render.rs and protocol/lib.rs, init font-sharing comment clarified. (5) Line counts verified against actual code: compositor main.rs = 174 lines, render library = 2,194 lines total — matches documentation claims exactly. Grep verification confirms zero remaining references to Content::Text, Content::Path, TextRun, PathCmd, CHROME_ICON, or SVG in .rs files. Layout helpers (layout_mono_lines, byte_to_line_col, scroll_runs) confirmed absent from scene library, present in core where documented.

issues.description: The 'Rendering architecture design' paragraph was cleaned up to remove the 'two incompatible rendering visions' context and fix the compositor line estimate from '~30 lines' to '~174 lines', which is correct. However, the CLAUDE.md also removed the test count '1,764 tests across 56 files' from the 'System code' line without replacing it with the current count (1,698). Minor — the test count is volatile and omitting it avoids staleness, so this is arguably an improvement.

sharedStateObservations.observation: .factory/library/architecture.md still references compositor/surface_pool.rs (line 93) and compositor/scene_render.rs (line 121), but these files moved to libraries/render/ in Phase 1. The architecture.md was not updated by this documentation feature, leaving stale file paths in the shared knowledge base.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: architecture.md:93 says 'compositor/surface_pool.rs' but actual path is libraries/render/surface_pool.rs. architecture.md:121 says 'compositor/scene_render.rs::render_shadow()' but actual path is libraries/render/scene_render.rs. Verified with: ls system/services/compositor/ shows only main.rs and frame_scheduler.rs; ls system/libraries/render/ shows surface_pool.rs, scene_render.rs, compositing.rs, cursor.rs, damage.rs, lib.rs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback notes that the os-worker skill assumes all features involve code changes requiring TDD, but pure documentation features should have TDD explicitly skippable. The worker followed the procedure and correctly identified this gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The os-worker skill assumes all features involve code changes requiring TDD. For pure documentation features, the TDD step should be explicitly skippable when no behavioral change is involved.' The skill's step 2 says 'For pure refactoring features... skip writing new tests' but doesn't mention documentation-only features.

summary: Pass. The cleanup-documentation feature delivers thorough, accurate documentation updates across CLAUDE.md, design/journal.md, and system/DESIGN.md reflecting the completed 3-phase rendering architecture redesign. All stale code comments were cleaned (CHROME_ICON constant, SVG references, TextRun doc comment, compositor-centric wording). Quantitative claims (174-line compositor, ~2,194-line render library) verified against actual code. Grep checks confirm zero remaining stale references in .rs files. One non-blocking observation: .factory/library/architecture.md still has stale file paths from before Phase 1 (compositor/surface_pool.rs, compositor/scene_render.rs) — not in scope for this feature but should be addressed.
